<?php namespace Illuminate\View; use Stringable; class AppendableAttributeValue implements Stringable { /** * The attribute value. * * @var mixed */ public $value; /** * Create a new appendable attribute value. * * @param mixed $value */ public function __construct($value) { $this->value = $value; } /** * Get the string value. * * @return string */ public function __toString() { return (string) $this->value; } }
